extracted.aact_title: A 16-Week Study to Learn About the Study Medicine Called Ritlecitinib in Adults With Long Lasting Painful Red Skin Lumps, Known by the Medical Term, Hidradenitis Suppurativa, or HS.
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Difference in proportion of responders based on Hidradenitis Suppurativa Clinical Response achieving at least 50% reduction from baseline (Hidradenitis Suppurativa Clinical Response HiSCR50) in patien
